meaning: n.吊,悬浮,悬浮液,暂停,中止,悬而未决,延迟
examples: The car's improved suspension gives you a smoother ride.
The active suspension system gives the car a very smooth ride.
Some trains were so overloaded that their suspension collapsed.
The lighthouse stands on a rugged tall cliff, connected to the mainland by a narrow steel suspension bridge.
Ms Shuter has been reinstated following a suspension, but is yet to return to the school.
